name: the contract doc and the GCTP handoff carry the paired invariants (epoch + absent-default + epoch-aware adoption)
command: grep -qi 'schema-additive with epoch' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/consumer-compatibility-contract.md" && grep -qi 'epoch-aware enforcement' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/consumer-compatibility-contract.md" && grep -q 'consumer_compatibility:' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/consumer-compatibility-contract.md" && grep -qi 'floors by epoch' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo contract-and-handoff 1>&2
